bash -s <<'EOF'
#!/bin/bash
if ! rpm -q kernel-core >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    echo "Remediation not applicable: kernel-core not installed" >&2
    exit 0
fi
maxdays=60
if [ -f /etc/login.defs ]; then
    line=$(grep -E '^PASS_MAX_DAYS' /etc/login.defs 2>/dev/null)
    if [ -n "$line" ]; then
        val=$(echo "$line" | awk '{print $2}')
        if [ -n "$val" ] && [[ "$val" =~ ^[0-9]+$ ]] && [ "$val" -ge 1 ] && [ "$val" -le 365 ]; then
            maxdays=$val
        fi
    fi
fi
awk -v maxdays="$maxdays" -F: 'BEGIN { while (getline < "/etc/passwd" > 0) { if ($3 >= 1000 && $7 != "/sbin/nologin" && $7 != "/bin/false" && $7 != "/usr/sbin/nologin") { uid[$1] = $3 } } } FILENAME=="/etc/passwd" { next } FILENAME=="/etc/shadow" { if ($2 !~ /^[!*]/ && $1 in uid) { if ($5 == "" || $5 > maxdays) { print $1 } } }' /etc/passwd /etc/shadow | while read -r user; do
    if chage -M "$maxdays" "$user" 2>/dev/null; then
        echo "Set max password age for $user to $maxdays" >&2
        ((success++))
    else
        echo "Failed to set max age for $user" >&2
        ((fail++))
    fi
done
echo "Summary: $success user(s) updated, $fail user(s) failed" >&2
exit 0
EOF
